source_name: AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML
content:
# AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI Project Workspace, premium Web App UI kit, SaaS dashboard component system, workspace project card grid, Liquid Glass form controls, glass modal and toast feedback, dashboard validation states, light glass dashboard, dark neon card highlight
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/ai-ui-test/index.html

Visual traits:
- light Liquid Glass surfaces with blur, saturation, translucent white fill, bright rim, inset highlight, and soft outer shadow
- dark neon glass cards with deep fill, low-opacity rim, cyan/magenta/orange glints, deep shadow, and neon ring
- rounded workspace component language using 22px fields, 28px cards, 40px modals, and 999px pills
- functional glass UI kit rather than landing page composition
- ambient dashboard background with subtle grid and enough visual input for backdrop-filter
- stateful glass surfaces with hover rims, focus rings, disabled opacity, validation glow, loading shimmer, and toast feedback

Use when:
- AI Project Workspace
- premium Web App UI kit
- SaaS dashboard component system
- workspace project card grid
- Liquid Glass form controls
- glass modal and toast feedback
- dashboard validation states
- light glass dashboard
- dark neon card highlight

Avoid when:
- ordinary marketing landing page
- video-first cinematic homepage
- dense spreadsheet-like table with hundreds of glass rows
- strict high-contrast enterprise workflow where transparency harms readability
- low-end device target with heavy full-screen blur
- static brochure page without app controls
- copying inspiration-only or review-required assets directly

AI summary: Liquid Glass Web App UI Kit for AI Project Workspace, SaaS dashboard, and premium web app surfaces. Not a landing page rule. Provides exact light glass and dark neon tokens, radius tokens, glass-card/glass-thick/glass-dark/glass-pill/glass-input/glass-toggle/tabs/icon-button/modal/toast/loading/validation/disabled component rules, workspace reveal motion timings, and accessibility fallbacks.

source_name: AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML
content:
# AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI Project Workspace, premium Web App UI kit, SaaS dashboard component system, workspace project card grid, Liquid Glass form controls, glass modal and toast feedback, dashboard validation states, light glass dashboard, dark neon card highlight
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/ai-ui-test/index.html

- Use this for Web App, SaaS Workspace, Dashboard, and AI Project Workspace tasks, not normal landing page sections.
- Start with a contained app shell over a soft ambient background and optional subtle grid.
- Place a functional hero or summary glass panel at the top only when it explains workspace context.
- Place toolbar controls under the hero: glass search input first, then primary and secondary glass pill actions.
- Place a glass tab filter bar before the project or dashboard card grid.
- Use a responsive card grid for projects, AI modules, datasets, tasks, or workspace entities.
- Use create/edit glass modals for structured entry flows instead of navigating away for small creation tasks.
- Treat form validation, loading, disabled, and toast states as required parts of the UI kit.

AI summary: Liquid Glass Web App UI Kit for AI Project Workspace, SaaS dashboard, and premium web app surfaces. Not a landing page rule. Provides exact light glass and dark neon tokens, radius tokens, glass-card/glass-thick/glass-dark/glass-pill/glass-input/glass-toggle/tabs/icon-button/modal/toast/loading/validation/disabled component rules, workspace reveal motion timings, and accessibility fallbacks.

source_name: AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML
content:
# AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML - Component Patterns

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI Project Workspace, premium Web App UI kit, SaaS dashboard component system, workspace project card grid, Liquid Glass form controls, glass modal and toast feedback, dashboard validation states, light glass dashboard, dark neon card highlight
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/ai-ui-test/index.html

- glass-card: base surface with fill-light, blur-md, 1px to 1.5px rim, outer shadow, inset highlight, inset-dark shadow, pseudo gloss, and optional chromatic caustics
- glass-thick: stronger hero, modal, or primary card surface with fill-thick, rim-bright, shadow-thick, and stronger inset highlight
- glass-dark: selected or premium project card using dark fill, dark rim, deep shadow, inset gloss, cyan/magenta/orange glints, and hover rim lift
- glass-pill: secondary toolbar or modal action with blur-sm, thick fill, pill radius, inset highlight, and restrained hover lift
- glass-pill-primary: one primary action with translucent accent fill, accent rim, glow, and restrained hover lift
- glass-input: search, select, text input, and textarea using blur-sm, field radius, inset shadow, placeholder contrast, focus ring, error glow, and success glow
- glass-toggle: pill track plus circular knob with checked accent fill, border, and subtle glow
- tab-bar and tab: inline glass filter bar with active fill/rim state and keyboard focus
- glass-icon-button: stable square or circular icon command with aria-label
- glass-modal: thick centered glass dialog with backdrop overlay, modal radius, scroll lock, readable form layout, and Escape close
- glass-toast: compact glass feedback using role=status or aria-live, text, icon, and spring-in motion
- loading shimmer: gradient shimmer overlay for submit buttons and skeleton states

AI summary: Liquid Glass Web App UI Kit for AI Project Workspace, SaaS dashboard, and premium web app surfaces. Not a landing page rule. Provides exact light glass and dark neon tokens, radius tokens, glass-card/glass-thick/glass-dark/glass-pill/glass-input/glass-toggle/tabs/icon-button/modal/toast/loading/validation/disabled component rules, workspace reveal motion timings, and accessibility fallbacks.

source_name: AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML
content:
# AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML - Interaction States

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI Project Workspace, premium Web App UI kit, SaaS dashboard component system, workspace project card grid, Liquid Glass form controls, glass modal and toast feedback, dashboard validation states, light glass dashboard, dark neon card highlight
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/ai-ui-test/index.html

- background reveal uses opacity 0 to 1, blur 18px to 0, 600ms
- hero reveal uses translateY(34px), blur 12px, 800ms, delay around 100ms
- toolbar reveal uses translateY(22px), blur 8px, 620ms, delay around 190ms
- card reveal uses translateY(28px), scale .975, blur 10px, 660ms, stagger 80ms to 140ms
- toast spring-in uses translateX(24px) to 0, 440ms, cubic-bezier(0.2,1.2,0.2,1)
- loading shimmer uses 1.2s ease-in-out infinite
- remove persistent will-change after animation completes
- hover states raise rim opacity and shadow without noisy flashing
- active states use pressed inset shadow
- disabled states reduce opacity, remove hover transform, reduce shadow, and block pointer events
- error and success validation states use colored rim, soft glow, and text message

AI summary: Liquid Glass Web App UI Kit for AI Project Workspace, SaaS dashboard, and premium web app surfaces. Not a landing page rule. Provides exact light glass and dark neon tokens, radius tokens, glass-card/glass-thick/glass-dark/glass-pill/glass-input/glass-toggle/tabs/icon-button/modal/toast/loading/validation/disabled component rules, workspace reveal motion timings, and accessibility fallbacks.

source_name: AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML
content:
# AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI Project Workspace, premium Web App UI kit, SaaS dashboard component system, workspace project card grid, Liquid Glass form controls, glass modal and toast feedback, dashboard validation states, light glass dashboard, dark neon card highlight
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/ai-ui-test/index.html

- Provide fallback solid or high-opacity translucent fills when backdrop-filter is unsupported.
- Support prefers-reduced-transparency with stronger opaque fills.
- Support prefers-reduced-motion; skip translate and blur and use quick opacity where possible.
- Use focus-visible rings on buttons, inputs, tabs, and icon buttons.
- Toast feedback needs aria-live or role=status.
- Modals need role=dialog and aria-modal=true.
- Escape closes modal.
- Close buttons need aria-label.
- Validation messages need aria-describedby.
- Do not communicate selected, error, success, or disabled states with glow alone.

AI summary: Liquid Glass Web App UI Kit for AI Project Workspace, SaaS dashboard, and premium web app surfaces. Not a landing page rule. Provides exact light glass and dark neon tokens, radius tokens, glass-card/glass-thick/glass-dark/glass-pill/glass-input/glass-toggle/tabs/icon-button/modal/toast/loading/validation/disabled component rules, workspace reveal motion timings, and accessibility fallbacks.

source_name: AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML
content:
# AI Project Workspace Liquid Glass local HTML - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI Project Workspace, premium Web App UI kit, SaaS dashboard component system, workspace project card grid, Liquid Glass form controls, glass modal and toast feedback, dashboard validation states, light glass dashboard, dark neon card highlight
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/ai-ui-test/index.html

- Light glass blur-sm: blur(18px) saturate(160%).
- Light glass blur-md: blur(24px) saturate(180%).
- Light glass blur-lg: blur(28px) saturate(185%).
- Light fill-light: rgba(255,255,255,0.48); fill-thick: rgba(255,255,255,0.62).
- Light rim: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); rim-bright: rgba(255,255,255,0.68).
- Light shadow-outer: 0 14px 36px rgba(31,38,135,0.16); shadow-thick: 0 22px 54px rgba(20,30,60,0.28).
- Light highlight: inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.80); inset-dark: inset 0 -1px 3px rgba(20,30,60,0.18).
- Dark fill: rgba(8,10,16,0.78); secondary fill: rgba(15,23,42,0.64).
- Dark rim: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); rim-hover: rgba(255,255,255,0.42).
- Dark cyan glint: rgba(34,211,238,0.36); magenta glint: rgba(217,70,239,0.30); orange glint: rgba(251,146,60,0.20).
- Dark deep shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(2,6,23,0.34), 0 8px 24px rgba(15,23,42,0.22).
- Dark neon ring: 0 0 0 1px rgba(34,211,238,0.38), 0 0 24px rgba(217,70,239,0.24).
- Radius tokens: field 22px, card 28px, modal 40px, pill 999px.
- Use CSS variables for tokens and component primitives so an app can switch between light glass and dark neon card variants.
- Use -webkit-backdrop-filter alongside backdrop-filter.

AI summary: Liquid Glass Web App UI Kit for AI Project Workspace, SaaS dashboard, and premium web app surfaces. Not a landing page rule. Provides exact light glass and dark neon tokens, radius tokens, glass-card/glass-thick/glass-dark/glass-pill/glass-input/glass-toggle/tabs/icon-button/modal/toast/loading/validation/disabled component rules, workspace reveal motion timings, and accessibility fallbacks.
